partner.title: Your Trusted Security Partner
partner.subtitle: Cyna delivers cutting-edge cybersecurity solutions to protect your organization from evolving threats. Our comprehensive platform combines SOC, EDR, XDR and threat intelligence.

expertSupport.title: Expert Support
expertSupport.description: Dedicated security analysts and support team

footer.tagline: Your trusted partner for enterprise security solutions. Protecting organizations with cutting-edge SOC, EDR, XDR and threat intelligence platforms.

cookieConsent.title: Cookies & privacy
cookieConsent.body: We store your choice in your browser (local storage) so this banner won't appear again. With your consent, we measure site traffic through Plausible — anonymous, cookieless, aggregated data. Refusing keeps the site 100% untracked.
cookieConsent.learnMore: Learn more in the privacy policy.

chatbot.title: Cyna Assistant
chatbot.greeting: Hi! I'm the Cyna assistant. Pick a question below or type your own — for anything else I'll point you to our support team.
chatbot.escalationMessage: I don't have an answer to that question. Would you like to contact our support team?

catalogue.subtitle: Explore Cyna's range and filter by category, availability or keywords. Results are sorted by priority then availability by default.

noResults.title: No results
noResults.helper: Adjust your filters or try a different search to discover our solutions.

carousel.regionAriaEmpty: No image available for this product

purchase.flexPerUser: Flexible pricing for any team size
purchase.demoToastDescription: Our sales team will contact you within 24 hours.

empty.hint: Check back later or browse the

search.subtitle: Refine your search with the filters below. Parameters are kept in the URL for sharing and navigation.

cart.pageDescription: Review your selected Cyna solutions before proceeding to checkout.
cart.heading: Cart
cart.totalHint: Indicative amount. The final total will be confirmed at checkout.
cart.notSignedInMsg: Sign in to save your cart.

empty.heading: Your cart is empty
empty.hint: Start exploring the Cyna catalog to add a solution to your cart.

checkout.pageDescription: Complete your Cyna order in a few steps.
checkout.heading: Checkout

billing.heading: Billing information
billing.subheading: Enter your billing details. Fields marked with an asterisk are required.

payment.heading: Payment method
payment.subheading: Payment is processed by Stripe, PCI-DSS certified. No card data transits our servers.
payment.notice: By clicking "Pay with Stripe", you'll be redirected to Stripe's secure payment page to enter your card details. The available payment methods depend on the Stripe account configuration.
payment.amountFooter: Amount shown for reference. The final total is recomputed server-side from Stripe prices when creating the Checkout Session.
payment.stripeNotice: You'll be redirected to Stripe's secure payment page.

checkoutSuccess.pageDescription: Confirmation of your order after Stripe payment. The order is created server-side by the Stripe webhook.

missing.heading: No payment session
missing.body: This page loads at the end of a Stripe payment. If you got here directly, please return to the catalog.

confirmed.heading: Order confirmed
confirmed.body: Thank you for your purchase. A confirmation email has been sent to {email} with the summary.

pending.heading: Payment being confirmed
pending.body: Stripe has confirmed your payment. We're waiting on the server notification to finalize your order. This usually takes a few seconds.
pending.timeout: The notification hasn't arrived yet. You can refresh below, or check your order history — it will appear as soon as the webhook is received.

shell.pageDescription: Manage your personal information, addresses and payment methods.
shell.heading: My account
shell.mfaRequiredBodyPrefix: Admin access requires 2FA. Enable it in the

personal.heading: Personal information
personal.subheading: Update your name and email, or change your password.
personal.emailReconfirmNotice: A re-confirmation email will be sent to the new address once Supabase Auth is wired in.

password.heading: Change password
password.subheading: Enter your current password to confirm the change.
password.rule: At least 8 characters, with an uppercase letter, a digit and a special character.

twoFactor.heading: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
twoFactor.subheading: Adds an extra step to sign-in: a 6-digit code generated by a TOTP app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password…). Admin access requires it.
twoFactor.qrStep1: Scan this QR code with your TOTP app.
twoFactor.qrAlt: QR code to scan with your TOTP app
twoFactor.secretToggle: Can't scan? Show the text secret
twoFactor.activeHint: You'll be prompted for a 6-digit code on your next admin sign-in.
twoFactor.recoveryHint: If you lose your TOTP device, contact another admin — recovery requires a database intervention (no built-in backup codes).
twoFactor.confirmDisableAdminAfter: until you re-enable it. Enter your current TOTP code to confirm.
twoFactor.confirmDisableUser: Enter your current TOTP code to confirm disabling.

toastEnabled.title: 2FA enabled
toastEnabled.desc: Your TOTP app is now required for admin access.

toastDisabled.title: 2FA disabled
toastDisabled.desc: Your TOTP factor has been removed.

mfaError.expired: The code has expired, start over.
mfaError.notFound: Factor not found, reload the page.

subscriptions.heading: My subscriptions
subscriptions.subheading: Manage your Cyna subscriptions. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the paid period — you keep access until then.
subscriptions.empty: You have no active subscriptions at the moment.
subscriptions.confirmCancelBody: Your access stays active until {date}. No refund, you can reactivate until then.

addresses.heading: Address book
addresses.subheading: Save your addresses to find them again at checkout.
addresses.confirmDeleteBody: This address will be removed from your book. If it was the default, you can designate another address as default.

paymentMethods.heading: Payment methods
paymentMethods.subheading: Your cards are stored with Stripe (PCI-DSS). No card data is kept by Cyna.
paymentMethods.emptyState: No cards saved. Click "Add a card" to register one via Stripe.

toastAddFailed.title: Card add failed
toastAddFailed.desc: Stripe rejected the registration. Try again with another card.

toastAddPending.title: Card add in progress
toastAddPending.desc: The card will appear here in a few moments.

toastNotFound.title: Card not found
toastNotFound.desc: The card has already been removed. List refreshed.

paymentMethods.confirmDeleteDefaultBody: This card is set as default. After deletion, Stripe will use another card for subscription renewals if one exists.
paymentMethods.confirmDeleteBody: This card will be detached from your Stripe account. You can register it again if needed.

addCard.footer: No card data is stored by Cyna. All information is sent directly to Stripe (PCI-DSS).
addCard.errorGeneric: Unable to save the card. Please check the entered information.
addCard.errorProcessing: The card is being processed. Try again in a few moments if it doesn't appear.

tools.heading: Contact & support
tools.subheading: A sales question, a technical topic or a note about your subscription? Our team is reachable via the form below. For quick answers to common questions, open the assistant.

form.heading: Contact us
form.subheading: Our team replies within 24 business hours.
form.gdprNotice: By sending this form, you agree that Cyna uses your contact details to answer your request. Your data is kept for 12 months (GDPR).
form.confirmation: Thanks! Your message has been sent to our support team. You'll receive a reply within 24 business hours.
form.genericSubmitError: We can't send your message right now. Please try again in a few moments.

errors.nameTooShort: Name must be at least {min} character.
errors.nameTooLong: Name must be at most {max} characters.
errors.emailTooLong: Email must be at most {max} characters.
errors.subjectTooShort: Subject must be at least {min} characters.
errors.subjectTooLong: Subject must be at most {max} characters.
errors.messageTooShort: Message must be at least {min} characters.
errors.messageTooLong: Message must be at most {max} characters.

chatbot.sectionSubheading: A quick question? Start a chat with the assistant. For a specific case, the contact form is the safer route.
chatbot.bullet2: · Preset answers on SOC / EDR / XDR and pricing.
chatbot.bullet3: · Escalation to a human agent goes through the form.
chatbot.greeting: Hi! I'm the Cyna assistant. I can answer a few common questions. For a specific case, open a ticket via the form.
chatbot.defaultAnswer: I don't have the exact answer. An agent will reply quickly — use the contact form on the left to describe your need.

faq.soc: The SOC (Security Operations Center) is a team and a platform that monitor your systems 24/7 and respond to incidents.
faq.edr: EDR (Endpoint Detection & Response) protects your workstations and servers: behavioral detection, isolation, remediation.
faq.xdr: XDR correlates signals from multiple surfaces (endpoint, network, cloud, identity) for more contextual detection.
faq.pricing: Each service is available monthly, annually and per user. Details are on the product page in the catalog.
faq.invoice: Invoices are available in /orders. PDF download is coming with the Supabase integration.

orders.heading: Order history
orders.subheading: Your orders are grouped by year, from the most recent to the oldest.

empty.heading: No orders yet
empty.hint: Once you complete your first purchase, you'll find it here with its summary and the associated invoice.

noMatch.heading: No matches
noMatch.hint: Adjust the filters to find an order.

filters.matchStatus: {count, plural, =0 {No order matches the filters.} =1 {1 order displayed.} other {# orders displayed.}}

orderCard.moreItems: + {count, plural, =1 {1 more service} other {# more services}}
orderCard.noItems: Service details unavailable for this order.
orderCard.indicativeTotal: Indicative total. The amount charged by Stripe is recomputed server-side at payment.
orderCard.paymentNote: Card information is stored with Stripe (PCI-DSS). Cyna only receives a tokenized identifier.

toast.noInvoiceDescNoInvoice: This order doesn't have an invoice yet (payment not finalized or pending).
toast.noInvoiceStripeMissing: The Stripe invoice is unavailable for this order.
toast.downloadFailedRetry: We couldn't retrieve the invoice at the moment. Please try again.
toast.downloadFailedNetwork: Check your connection and try again. If the issue persists, contact support.

legal.onlyFrenchNotice: This legal content is only available in French for now.

about.heading: About Cyna
about.subheading: Our mission, our approach and what sets us apart.
about.missionBody: Cyna is a French vendor of SaaS cybersecurity solutions for businesses of all sizes. We provide SOC, EDR, XDR and threat intelligence platforms, designed to be deployed quickly and operated with no friction by security teams.
about.approachBody: We believe good defense rests on three pillars: fast detection, automated response and a clear operator experience. Our products combine behavioral detection models, response orchestration and a console built for SOC analysts — not marketing demos.
about.sovereigntyBody: Data hosted in the European Union, full GDPR compliance.
about.transparencyBody: No black box: every alert is explainable, every automated action is audited.
about.accessibilityBody: Clear pricing (monthly, annual, per user) and a contract with no hidden silent renewal.
about.contactBodyPrefix: For a demo, a sales question or a technical topic, use the

cgu.pageTitle: Terms of use and sale — Cyna
cgu.heading: Terms of use and sale
